metadata.description: Websites from Markdown for AI coding agents. Full product — MCP server, skills, auto-attaching rules, and the sitemd binary.

plugins.name: sitemd
plugins.description: The complete sitemd toolkit for Cursor — MCP server, a full suite of skills, auto-attaching rules, and a complete website framework. Requires the sitemd binary; auto-fetched via the npm postinstall hook (recommended: scaffold a project with `npx @sitemd-cc/sitemd init`) or via `./sitemd/install` after installing the plugin into an existing project.
